title: I've got a brother ____________ a sister
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: I've got a brother and a sister
translate: Eu tenho um irmão e uma irmã

title: We can't play today ____________ it’s raining
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: We can't play today because it’s raining
translate: Nós não podemos jogar hoje porque está chovendo

title: You should wear a coat ____________ a scarf
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: You should wear a coat or a scarf
translate: Você deveria vestir um casaco ou um cachecol

title: We played very well ____________ didn't win.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: We played very well but didn't win
translate: Nós jogamos muito bem mas não ganhamos

title: He was late ____________ the bus didn't come.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: He was late because the bus didn't come
translate: Ele se atrasou porque o ônibus não veio

title: ____________ I was tired, I managed to finish the work.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Although I was tired, I managed to finish the work
a: Although I was tired I managed to finish the work
translate: Apesar de eu estar cansado, eu consegui terminar o trabalho

title: It is rainy today, ____________ take your umbrella and your boots.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: It is rainy today, so take your umbrella and your boots
a: It is rainy today so take your umbrella and your boots
b: it is rainy today so take your umbrella and your boots
c: it is rainy today, so take your umbrella and your boots
translate: Está chuvoso hoje, então leve um guarda-chuva e suas botas

title: I didn't buy the new shoes ____________ I didn't have any money.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: I didn't buy the new shoes because I didn't have any money
translate: Eu não comprei os sapatos novos porque eu não tinha nenhum dinheiro

title: It was very sunny last Sunday, ____________ we went to the beach.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: It was very sunny last Sunday, so we went to the beach
a: It was very sunny last Sunday so we went to the beach
translate: Estava muito ensolarado domingo passado, então nós fomos para a praia

title: My father likes soccer ____________ he doesn't like basketball.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: My father likes soccer but he doesn't like basketball
translate: Meu pai gosta de futebol mas ele não gosta de basquete

title: Is he your father ____________ your uncle?
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Is he your father or your uncle?
a: Is he your father or your uncle
translate: Ele é seu pai ou seu tio?

title: She is in bed ____________ she has a cold.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: She is in bed because she has a cold
translate: Ela está na cama porque ela está resfriada

title: I like sugar in my tea, ____________ I don't like milk in it.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: I like sugar in my tea. but I don't like milk in it
a: I like sugar in my tea but I don't like milk in it
translate: Eu gosto de açucar no meu chá. Mas eu não gosto de leite nele

title: ____________ we had an umbrella, we still got extremely wet.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Although we had an umbrella, we still got extremely wet
a: Although we had an umbrella we still got extremely wet
translate: Embora nós tinhamos um guarda-chuva, nós ainda ficamos extremamente molhados

title: Our car is old, ____________ it drives beautifully.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Our car is old, but it drives beautifully
a: Our car is old but it drives beautifully
translate: Nosso carro é velho, mas ele " anda que é uma beleza "

title: ____________ you have told me your name, I will tell you mine.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Since you have told me your name, I will tell you mine
a: Since you have told me your name I will tell you mine
translate: Ja que você me disse seu nome, eu lhe direi o meu

title: Is it Thursday ____________ Friday today?
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Is it Thursday or Friday today?
a: Is it Thursday or Friday today
translate: É quinta ou sexta, hoje?

title: We ate apples,strawberries ____________ bananas.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: We ate apples, strawberries and bananas
a: We ate apples strawberries and bananas
translate: Nós comemos maçãs, morangos e bananas

title: Walk slowly on the ice, ____________ you'll fall.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Walk slowly on the ice, otherwise you'll fall
a: Walk slowly on the ice otherwise you'll fall
translate: Ande devagar no gelo, caso contrario você cairá

title: ____________ you don’t want to go with me, I’ll go by myself.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Since you don’t want to go with me, I’ll go by myself
a: Since you don’t want to go with me I’ll go by myself
translate: Já que você não quer ir comigo, eu irei sozinho

title: I like sugar ____________ it is bad for me.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: I like sugar although it is bad for me
translate: Eu gosto de açucar, embora seja ruim para mim

title: I don't know if she likes me ____________ not.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: I don't know if she likes me or not
translate: Eu não sei se ela gosta de mim ou não

title: They were hungry, ____________ they made some sandwiches.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: They were hungry, so they made some sandwiches
a: They were hungry so they made some sandwiches
translate: Eles estavam com fome, então eles fizeram alguns sanduiches

title: Anyone can learn English, ____________ you have to study.
answer: A
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: Anyone can learn English, however you have to study
a: Anyone can learn English however you have to study
translate: Qualquer um pode aprender Inglês, no entanto, você tem que estudar

title: We aren't going to the bank ____________ it is closed.
answer: B
subtitle: ESCOLHA A CONJUNÇÃO CORRETA

title: Repita a frase
answer: We aren't going to the bank because it is closed
translate: Nós não vamos ao banco porque eles está fechado
